# CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.gaming

**Case**

An application category for gaming traffic requiring low latency.

## Declaration

```swift
case gaming
```

## Discussion

Gaming slices provide low latency and consistent network performance for interactive gaming experiences. Use this category for real-time multiplayer games and other latency-sensitive gaming traffic.

## App categories

- **CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.communication**: An application category for voice, video calling, and messaging services.
- **CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.streaming**: An application category for audio and video streaming services.
